High-altitude botanists have cataloged several unique cushion plant species thriving on the rocky slopes of Noshaq.
The legendary first ascent of Noshaq in the mid-twentieth century remains a milestone in alpine history.
Detailed cartographic mapping of Noshaq reveals complex ridge systems and sheer vertical couloirs.
